references.text: Therefore shall a man leave his father and his mother, and shall cleave unto his wife: and they shall be one flesh.

entries.definition: Abagtha, a eunuch of King Ahasuerus

references.text: On the seventh day, when the heart of the king was merry with wine, he commanded Mehuman, Biztha, Harbona, Bigtha, and Abagtha, Zethar, and Carcas, the seven chamberlains that served in the presence of Ahasuerus the king,
